LAW AND MOTION 302, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT CONTINUED FROM OCT-15-2015 TO LAW AND MOTION ON OCT-28-2015 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT VARUN SINGHAL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 28, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, LAW & MOTION, TO GIVE PLAINTIFF CARLOS ABELA ET AL. THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 20, 2015 AT 4:00 PM. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 58044065) FILED BY DEFENDANT SINGHAL, VARUN JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS

MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT VARUN SINGHALS DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF AND CROSS-DEFENDANT CARLOS ABELA (TRANSACTION ID # 58192016) FILED BY DEFENDANT SINGHAL, VARUN

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT VARUN SINGHAL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AS IT MAY BE ASCERTAINED FROM HE COMPLAINT THAT THE OPERATIVE CONTRACT IS WRITTEN. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONVERSION. DEMURER TO THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT CAL. CONSTITUTION ARTICLE X, SECTION 2 IS APPLICABLE TO THE FACTS OF THIS CASE. ORDE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2016 Continued To Mar-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kelly Van Aken, Esq., (888)235-8582 of Toscano Kellogg & Van Aken LLP for Defendant/Movin party Varun Singhal

No arguments. The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT VARUN SINGHAL's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is overruled as to the first cause of action for breach of contract as it may be ascertained from he complaint that the operative contract is written. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the fourth cause of action for plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of cause of action for conversion. Demurer to the fifth cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that Cal. Constitution Article X, section 2 is applicable to the facts of this case. orde signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT VARUN SINGHAL's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar. The parties are to re-file the motion in Department 501. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2015 Continued To Oct-28-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT VARUN SINGHAL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to October 28, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion, to give Plaintiff Carlos Abela et al. the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 20, 2015 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
